description: A FOIA request seeks the following records: manufacturing formulas, processes, and quality-control and internal-security measures submitted voluntarily to FDA to assist with cyanide-tampering investigations because agencies relied heavily on such information and would be less likely to obtain it if businesses feared that it would be made public.
